name: skillswap-campus
description: SkillSwap Campus – Real-Time Student Skill Exchange Platform

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --legacy-peer-deps --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm start --prefix frontend" --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" --prefix-colors "bgBlue.bold,bgGreen.bold"
